administration.activityPub.intro: Platform-wide kill switch for ActivityPub federation. When disabled, WebFinger, actors, inboxes, and outboxes return 404 for all authors until re-enabled.
administration.activityPub.optInDesc: Allow authors who opt in to publish to the Fediverse. Turn off to halt all federation traffic immediately.
administration.activityPub.disabled: ActivityPub is disabled by server configuration (contraponto.activitypub.enabled=false). Enable the environment variable and redeploy to use this panel.

accountEmail.activation.subject: Activate your %s account
accountEmail.activation.title: Activate account
accountEmail.activation.body: Thanks for signing up on %s. Confirm your email address to activate your account.
accountEmail.activation.expiry: This link expires in %d hour(s). If you did not create an account, use the link below to notify the site administrator.
accountEmail.activation.footer: You received this email because a new account was created with this address.
accountEmail.passwordReset.subject: Reset your %s password
accountEmail.passwordReset.title: Reset password
accountEmail.passwordReset.body: We received a request to reset the password for your %s account.
accountEmail.passwordReset.expiry: This link expires in %d hour(s). If you did not request a reset, you can ignore this email.
accountEmail.passwordReset.footer: You received this email because a password reset was requested for your account.
accountEmail.passwordChanged.subject: Your %s password was changed
accountEmail.passwordChanged.title: Password changed
accountEmail.passwordChanged.warning: If you did not make this change, contact support immediately and reset your password.
accountEmail.passwordChanged.footer: You received this email because your account password was changed.
accountEmail.emailChangeVerification.bod: Confirm your new email address for your %s account:
accountEmail.emailChangeVerification.exp: This link expires in %d hour(s). Your current email stays active until you confirm.
accountEmail.emailChangeVerification.foo: You received this email because an email change was requested on your account.
accountEmail.emailChanged.subject: Your %s email address was changed
accountEmail.emailChanged.title: Email changed
accountEmail.emailChanged.body: Your %s account email address was changed to %s.
accountEmail.emailChanged.warning: If you did not make this change, contact support immediately.
accountEmail.emailChanged.footer: You received this email because your account email address was changed.
